title: Limitless Leveling
description: Removes the cap on the maximum level of enchantments—go and craft that OP weapon you dream of.
body:
![Limitless Leveling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60b740444beb9cb6886a2d70c29627bb6db85f07.png)

With this mod, there is no longer a maximum level for enchantments. Sharpness XX? Fortune V? Go ahead! 

## Features
- Removed level cap when combining enchantments in the anvil. Enchantments with maximum level 1 are exempt from this, so no "Infinity II".
- Removed "Too Expensive" restriction in anvils so you can combine high-level enchantments.
- All enchantment levels are displayed using roman numerals, no more "enchantment.level.100".
- Removed maximum enchantment level of 255.

## Gallery
![Combining two Sharpness VII books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b839493aabcadbdd6fdeb9fdbb39c14c1c18a02c.png)

_Combining two Sharpness VII books._

![Expensive combinations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57021b8b9da9bb0fb2418de292d22ece006d1a7f_0.webp)

_Applying enchantments gets expensive, but there is no "Too Expensive" restriction to stop you._

## Modpacks
Yes, you can use this mod in your modpack.
